basics.name: Bruno Germán Rodríguez Sepúlveda
basics.label: Computer Scientist and Software Engineer
basics.summary: Experienced professional adept in the domains of AI, software development, and big data, with a proven track record of delivering innovative solutions. Committed to leveraging my expertise for impactful initiatives in the realms of health, education, and environmental sustainability.

work.name: Millennium Institute for Foundational Research on Data
work.summary: Developing a framework for private data release for big data applications.

work.name: PSINet
work.summary: Team Manager: Led and organized the development team using agile methodologies. Executed the recruitment process for new members. Implemented continuous improvement initiatives, improving code quality and reducing project delivery times. Collaborated with clients to gather and document requirements, ensuring a clear understanding of project objectives. Designed and developed a responsive front-end in React, Django with PostgreSQL back-end, received positive feedback from end-users.

work.name: Capstone Project - Maipu Municipality
work.summary: Developed a web application for City Hall to streamline the monitoring, control, and management of their vehicle fleet operations. This encompassed designing a website interface in React, creating a comprehensive system for vehicle, driver, and ride management and its logic, and seamlessly integrating the website with geolocation APIs. Notably, this initiative resulted in enhanced transparency within fleet operations, substantial cost reductions, and valuable contributions to pollution mitigation efforts.

work.name: Premialab
work.summary: Explored applications of novel AI algorithms in financial context. Resulted in the development of an algorithm to recognize key factors on intra-day momentum trading strategies, leading to new insights on daily trends.

work.name: Amazon
work.summary: Trained on security and all warehouse processes. Receiving, sorting, and storing items in warehouse facilities, packing and shipping. Assistant to engineers and managers in the outbound section.

volunteer.name: DzaritmiK
volunteer.summary: Organized and led music workshops for children in disadvantaged environments. Managed international relationships and NGO partnerships. Developed skills in scheduling, multicultural communication, and all-age teaching methodologies.

volunteer.name: CMAT - School Mathematics Championship Chile
volunteer.summary: Leading problem discussions and selection for the School Mathematics Championship. Developed rigorous proofreading and test creation.

awards.title: Outstanding Student Award
awards.summary: Awarded to the top 10% of students in the Computer Science Department.

awards.title: Best Math Score University Admission Test - Atacama Region

Individual Bronze Medal - School Mathematics Championship Chile
Team Gold Medal - School Mathematics Championship Chile
